remaining_blockers: Real Device/App OAuth UI/system-browser/callback to encrypted CredentialStore to StoreArchive roundtrip evidence is still missing. The ignored live gates seeded encrypted CredentialStore entries from locally available Claude/Codex credentials and proved the product load path plus real provider stream/tool roundtrip, but they do not prove the final user OAuth flow through the app.

This committed manifest/artifact set is not final-head-bound by construction. A PR-ready evidence bundle must be regenerated after the final content commit or produced by CI/external artifact with --require-head.

head_binding.reason: A tracked manifest cannot contain the hash of the commit that also changes it. Use this as blocked handoff evidence; regenerate after the final commit for PR-ready evidence.

local_client_header_drift.live_acceptance: Both product providers were accepted by their live backends using local credentials seeded into the encrypted CredentialStore path; this is live runtime acceptance of the in-repo header/body recipe, not raw installed-client header extraction.

device_app_oauth_flow.required_to_close: Run a real app/device OAuth start/callback/complete flow that writes encrypted credentials, then prove provider stream + StoreArchive tool roundtrip from that stored credential.

live_harness.seed_source: explicit environment variables persisted through the same encrypted app-host CredentialStore load path used by product OAuth
must_observe: StoreArchive tool_result from seeded fixture m-live
usage.provider and usage.model in agent status
live_harness.claude_live_command: Python harness read local Claude OAuth JSON without printing values, set ISY623_CLAUDE_OAUTH_ACCESS/REFRESH in the child environment, then ran cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers live_claude_oauth_storearchive_tool_roundtrip -- --ignored --nocapture
live_harness.codex_live_command: Python harness read local Codex auth JSON without printing values, set ISY623_CODEX_OAUTH_ACCESS/REFRESH/ACCOUNT_ID in the child environment, then ran cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-app-host --features agent-oauth-providers live_codex_oauth_storearchive_tool_roundtrip -- --ignored --nocapture
live_harness.workspace_test_observation: cargo +1.95.0 test --workspace --no-fail-fast previously passed; after the live-gate fixture fix, the two product OAuth live gates passed when explicitly run with local credentials seeded into the child process.

live_gates_passed.seed: local Claude OAuth credential copied into child-process ISY623_* env only
local Codex OAuth credential copied into child-process ISY623_* env only
